name: sofas-extension
description: Plays a satisfying sound when your tests fail and succeed. Because silence is worse.

commands.title: SOFAS: Enable Sound on Test Failure
SOFAS: Disable Sound on Test Failure

sofasOnFail.enabled.description: Enable or disable sound on test failure.

sofasOnFail.failSound.description: Which built-in sound to play on failure.

enumDescriptions: hip hop beat to get you moving
sofasOnFail.successSound.description: Sound to play when all tests pass.

sofasOnFail.volume.description: Playback volume (0.1 = whisper, 1.0 = announce to the office).

sofasOnFail.customFailSoundPath.description: Path to a custom .wav or .mp3 to play on failure. Overrides the built-in sound.

sofasOnFail.customSuccessSoundPath.description: Path to a custom .wav or .mp3 to play on success.

sofasOnFail.showNotification.description: Show a notification message when tests fail.

sofasOnFail.showSuccessNotification.description: Show a notification message when tests pass.

default: Somewhere, a unit test just gave up.
The tests have spoken. They're not happy.
Your code has been found guilty.
Have you tried not breaking things?
sofasOnFail.failMessages.description: Pool of messages randomly shown on test failure.

sofasOnFail.extraTestCommands.description: Additional terminal commands to treat as test runs (e.g. ["bash test.sh", "./run_tests"]).

sofasOnFail.cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between sounds. Prevents spamming when re-running rapidly.

sofasOnFail.onlyActiveEditor.description: Only trigger sounds when VS Code is the active window.
